model.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6
model.description: Anthropic • Fast flagship Claude model for coding, analysis, and high-throughput agent use.

pick.rationale: Arizona enters as the #3 team in the country by both KenPom (+37.56 AdjEM) and Torvik (#3), boasting a 31-2 record built against elite Big 12 competition, a top-10 offense (AdjOE 126.2, ranked 10th nationally), and the 3rd-best defense in the country (AdjDE 91.1) — a level of two-way excellence that LIU's NEC schedule never approached. The efficiency gap between these teams is a staggering 41.5 points (Arizona +37.56 vs. LIU -3.95), one of the largest mismatches in the entire bracket, and the betting market opened Arizona as a -29.5 point favorite — among the largest spreads in tournament history. LIU's 24-10 record as NEC champions is admirable, but their KenPom #216 ranking, negative AdjEM, and offense ranked 239th nationally create no credible path to neutralizing Arizona's elite defense or matching their offensive firepower. The historical 1-vs-16 record and this specific efficiency chasm make Arizona's advancement a near-certainty.

reasoningStep.title: Arizona vs. LIU — Round of 64 West Region Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Arizona is a historically dominant 1-seed matchup against LIU, a 16-seed NEC automatic qualifier. The adjusted efficiency gap of 41.5 points (KenPom #3 vs. #216) is one of the largest in the bracket. Arizona opened as a -29.5 favorite. No meaningful injury concerns were identified for Arizona. LIU's offense (239th nationally) and defense (196th by Torvik) are wholly outmatched by Arizona's top-3 two-way profile. No credible upset path exists.
evidence: Torvik Ratings: Arizona Rank #3, AdjOE 126.2 (10th nationally), AdjDE 91.1 (3rd nationally), Record 31-2 in Big 12. LIU Rank #234, AdjOE 103.6 (269th), AdjDE 109.7 (196th), Record 24-10 in NEC.
KenPom Ratings: Arizona Rank #3, AdjEM +37.56, AdjO 127.2 (7th), AdjD 89.7. LIU Rank #216, AdjEM -3.95, AdjO 105.7 (239th), AdjD 109.6. Efficiency gap: 41.51 points.
Betting Market (Action Network): Arizona opened as a -29.5 point favorite over LIU, one of the largest spreads in NCAA Tournament history. Total set at 150.5.

ESPN bracket profile: Arizona finished 32-2 overall, won their first 23 games of the season, and is listed as a national championship contender at +390 odds with no significant injury concerns identified.

LIU Tournament Profile: LIU won the NEC regular season and tournament championship (7th in program history), entering as a 16-seed with a 24-10 record and no notable wins over power-conference opponents this season.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.
